## Motivation

<!-- Why is this change necessary? Link any related GitHub issues or Jira tickets here (e.g., Closes #123). -->

## Type of Change

<!-- Please delete options that are not relevant. -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Tooling, CI/CD, or dependency update (`chore`)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding style and conventions (e.g. no DOM references in `src/engine/`).
- [ ] I have run `npm run format` locally to ensure files are clean.
- [ ] I have run `npm test` locally and all tests passed.
- [ ] I have added/updated unit tests to cover my changes where applicable.
- [ ] My changes do not expose any secrets, credentials, or `.env` configurations.
